title: Advance Rise Basketball Manager
description:
BUILD A TEAM. MANAGE THE MONEY. SURVIVE THE SEASON. CHASE THE ARCH. CREATE A BASKETBALL DYNASTY

A basketball franchise management simulator where you build dynasties across decades. Control finances, marketing, player development, trades, drafts, stadium growth, Hall of Fame legacies, and championship runs in a fully simulated basketball universe.

AR BASKETBALL feels closer to a franchise civilization-builder than a traditional basketball management sim.  

[Game Features]

• Deep Basketball Franchise Simulation

AR Basketball is a fictional basketball franchise simulator built around long-term team building, league progression, and dynamic storytelling. Take control of a team in a 16-team Basketball league and guide your franchise through 100-game seasons, roster decisions, financial pressure, draft classes, trades, playoffs and awards.

AR Basketball is designed for players who enjoy strategy, puzzles, long-term progression, and watching a fictional sports world evolve over time.  

• 16-Team Fictional League

Compete in a full league with conferences, districts, unique team identities, standings, schedules and playoff races.

• 100-Game Season

Manage your team across long regular seasons where every decision affects your record, money, fans, morale and future success. 

• Drafts

Scout, draft, develop and manage players over multiple seasons, build around stars, role players, rookies and franchise players

• Draftrade and Trade System

Make roster moves through costly trades and special "Draftrade" events where teams can reshape their future during the early part of the season.

• Team Finances and Economy

Manage cash, payroll, marketing, medical spending, ticket prices, sponsorships, merchandise, fanbase growth and franchise value. Each will require special attention to detail and experimentation. Some will be direct others will be indirectly controlled. 

• Area and Budget Upgrades

Invest in your organization by upgrading your arena and improving the business side of your team

• Coaches and Team Identity

Hire Coaches with different budget allocations and manipulation.

• Awards, Hall of Fame, and League History

Track Player's careers, championships, awards, all-star selections, hall of fame careers and long-term league storylines.

• Long-Term Completion Goals

This sport-sim stratedy game does have victory conditions. Play towards different win conditions, including fans, championships, money or a legacy-based success.

• Dynamic League Progression

The League changes over time as teams rise, fall, draft new stars, go broke, become dynasties or rebuild from the bottom.
description_short: AR Basketball is a long-term basketball franchise simulator where team chemistry, economics, fan growth, player personalities, and league history matter just as much as winning championships. Build your organization across 100 seasons and chase multiple paths to greatness.
